path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); animation: 500ms linear 0s infinite normal none running ge-flow-animation-f_vfGMWSaVMnodBhAhTs; stroke-dashoffset: 16;
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
